keyPoints: Deliberate-difficulty prompts and constraint-based AI workflows to reduce AI over-reliance.
Multi-dimensional empathy outcomes (cognitive, emotional, motivational) and objective transfer metrics to real interactions.
Real-world social engagement as primary transfer endpoint using EMA, peer reports, and activity logs.
Three-arm RCT design: standard AI, constraint-based deliberate prompts, constraint-based with transfer scaffolding.
Digital therapeutic alliance as a mediator and loneliness/trust in AI as moderators.
Rigorous fidelity reporting, safety governance, and preregistration to ensure reproducibility.
